detectors.name: missing_nonreentrant
detectors.description: Flags @external functions that perform external calls or value transfers without @nonreentrant.

detectors.name: unsafe_raw_call
detectors.description: Flags raw_call() invocations whose success is not asserted or checked.

detectors.name: missing_event_emission
detectors.description: Flags @external functions that modify state without emitting an event.

detectors.name: timestamp_dependence
detectors.description: Flags use of block.timestamp in conditional logic.

detectors.name: integer_overflow
detectors.description: Flags explicit unsafe arithmetic calls (unsafe_add/sub/mul/div) that bypass Vyper built-in overflow protection.

detectors.name: unprotected_selfdestruct
detectors.description: Flags selfdestruct() calls without access-control checks.

detectors.name: unprotected_state_change
detectors.description: Flags writes to sensitive state variables (owner, admin, ...) without msg.sender checks.

detectors.name: send_in_loop
detectors.description: Flags send()/raw_call() inside unbounded loops (DoS risk).

detectors.name: unchecked_subtraction
detectors.description: Flags self.x -= y without a preceding sufficient-balance/assertion guard.

detectors.name: cei_violation
detectors.description: Flags external calls that occur before state updates (Checks-Effects-Interactions violation).

detectors.name: compiler_version_check
detectors.description: Always-on pragma/version vulnerability checks for known Vyper compiler advisories.
